cases.title: Create user with valid name and email
cases.summary: A POST /users with valid name and email returns HTTP 201 with the created user.
cases.expectedOutcome: User is created and response contains userId, name, and email.

steps.summary: Create a user with a valid name and a valid email address.

cases.title: Create user with name at minimum length boundary (1 character)
cases.summary: A name of exactly 1 character satisfies the minimum length constraint and produces HTTP 201.

steps.summary: Create a user with a 1-character name.

cases.title: Create user with name at maximum length boundary (100 characters)
cases.summary: A name of exactly 100 characters satisfies the maximum length constraint and produces HTTP 201.

steps.summary: Create a user with a 100-character name.

cases.title: Reject user creation when name is missing
cases.summary: Omitting the required name field returns HTTP 400.
cases.expectedOutcome: Request is rejected with an error indicating the name field is required.

steps.summary: Send a create-user request with the name field omitted.

cases.title: Reject user creation when name is empty string
cases.summary: A name of zero characters violates the minimum length constraint and returns HTTP 400.
cases.expectedOutcome: Request is rejected with an error indicating the name length is invalid.

steps.summary: Send a create-user request with an empty string for name.

cases.title: Reject user creation when name exceeds 100 characters
cases.summary: A name longer than 100 characters violates the maximum length constraint and returns HTTP 400.
cases.expectedOutcome: Request is rejected with an error indicating the name length is invalid.

steps.summary: Send a create-user request with a 101-character name.

cases.title: Reject user creation when email is missing
cases.summary: Omitting the required email field returns HTTP 400.
cases.expectedOutcome: Request is rejected with an error indicating the email field is required.

steps.summary: Send a create-user request with the email field omitted.

cases.title: Reject user creation when email format is invalid
cases.summary: An email that does not conform to the email format returns HTTP 400.
cases.expectedOutcome: Request is rejected with an error indicating the email format is invalid.

steps.summary: Send a create-user request with a malformed email (e.g., missing @ symbol).

cases.title: Reject user creation with duplicate email
cases.summary: Submitting the same email address as an existing user returns HTTP 409.
cases.expectedOutcome: Request is rejected with a conflict error indicating the email is already registered.

steps.summary: Create a user with a unique email to establish the duplicate.
Attempt to create another user using the same email address.
